claim_bullets.bullet_text: We used generators to build iterators that maintain implicit state. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.273-275)
The moves a player makes are a stream of values, just like the contents of an array can be consider a stream of values. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.273-275)
But of course, iterating over a stream of moves requires us to wait for the game to be over so we know what moves were made. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.273-275)

source_record_text: Interactive Generators chapter covering generators, stateful functions, and examples.
